CREATE TABLE test_arrays (arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_arrays VALUES ([1, 3, NULL], [2, 3, NULL]);
SELECT arrayUnion(arr1, arr2) AS num_example FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayUnion(arr1, []) AS empty_example FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayUnion(['hi'], [], ['hello', 'hi']) AS str_example FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayUnion([1, 2, 3], [3, 4, 5], [5, 6, NULL]) AS complex_union FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayUnion((SELECT arr1 FROM test_arrays WHERE arr1[1] = -2), (SELECT arr2 FROM test_arrays WHERE arr2[1] = 10)) AS nested_union;
SELECT arrayUnion(ARRAY JOIN arr1, ARRAY JOIN arr2 FROM test_arrays) AS cross_join_union;
SELECT arrayUnion(arrayMap(x -> x + 1, arr1), arrayMap(x -> x * 2, arr2)) AS mapped_union FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayUnion(arrayUnion(arr1, arr2), arrayUnion([7, 8], [9, 10])) AS multi_union FROM test_arrays;
CREATE TABLE test_data (id Int32, arr Array(String));
SELECT id, arrayUnion(arr) AS fruit_union FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
SELECT arrayUnion((SELECT arr FROM test_data WHERE id = 1), (SELECT arr FROM test_data WHERE id = 2)) AS fruit_union_subquery;
